title: 2025 CBASS MarHE workshop
author: Voolstra, Christian R.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
CBASS data and Benthic Survey data from November 2025 MarHE CBASS workshop 
 CBASS 
 
 coral species abbreviations: Acr = Acropora muricata; Plob = Porites lobata; Prus = Porites rus; Pver = Pocillopora verrucosa 
 CBASS pilot run: 3 colonies each of Acr, Plob, Prus, Pver from MarHE nursery reef site; date: 20251126 
 CBASS Plob: 20 colonies of Plob from Coral Garden reef site; date: 20251127 
 CBASS Prus: 20 colonies of Prus from Coral Garden reef site; date: 20251129 
 Collection depths: 3 - 10 m 
 
 Benthic Survey 
 
 4 transects 'deep' at depth ~10 m; Coral Garden reef site; date: 20251128 
 4 transects 'shallow' at depth 3-5m; Coral Garden reef site; date: 20251128 
 following protocol: Colin, L., Kraft, L., Garbiela, P., Bell, A., & Voolstra, C. R. (2024). Benthic survey protocol to determine coral cover, abundance, and growth form diversity [Protocol]. In zenodo.org; https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.13268547. https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.13268547
